@actual-app/api.notes: Active nightly builds. package.json now ^26.7.0. Consumed via dynamic ESM import; Knip false-positive, excluded.

@modelcontextprotocol/sdk.notes: package.json ^1.29.0. Earlier transitive hono CVE (#138) no longer reported by npm audit (0 vulns). Consumed via runtime API; Knip false-positive, excluded.

fuse.js.notes: New direct dependency (^7.4.2) since last audit. Fuzzy-search library. Actively maintained, recent publish, high adoption. Healthy.

jose.notes: Direct dependency (^6.2.3), now at latest range. Issue #115 closed. Healthy.

mcp-auth.notes: 0.2.0 current and latest, published <6mo ago. Downloads 24K/wk (above 10K warning threshold). Healthy but small ecosystem; monitor.

prom-client.notes: optionalDependency (*). Last publish ~2yr (feature-complete). No deprecation, 7.5M dl/wk. Monitor, stable utility.

winston-daily-rotate-file.notes: Last publish Feb 2024 (~29mo, WARNING window). No deprecation, 1.6M dl/wk. Stable feature-complete utility; monitor, no ticket (unchanged assessment).

@playwright/test.notes: package.json ^1.60.0. Test-only; known Knip false positive.

knip.notes: New tracked devDependency (^6.16.1). 6.25.0 installed → 6.26.0 latest (patch drift, info-only). Dead-code tool, CI-blocking since #237.

node-fetch.notes: devDependency (^3.3.2). Last publish ~3yr (feature-complete; Node 22 has native fetch). No deprecation, 153M dl/wk. Used only in test clients (src/tests/testMcpClient.ts, tests/manual/mcp-client.js). Replaceable by native fetch long-term; monitor, no ticket.

tsconfig-paths.notes: Last publish Mar 2023 (>3yr, feature-complete). 84M dl/wk. Known Knip false positive (scripts/register-tsconfig-paths.js). Monitor, no ticket.

typescript.notes: package.json ^6.0.3. Latest 7.0.2 (native Go compiler port, 1 major behind, below 2+ threshold, info-only). No ticket.

2026-05-07.versionDrift: All <1 major behind (info-only). dotenv/jose/zod/typescript drifts covered by closed-issue #128 / open PR #126.

2026-07-11.type: full re-audit (30-day window expired; last audit 2026-05-07)
2026-07-11.redundantDuplicates: none actionable (only transitive mime-db/mime-types + optional platform-binary noise from npm dedupe --dry-run)
2026-07-11.vulnerabilities: 0 (npm audit clean across all severities; prior ip-address/express-rate-limit/hono findings from #137/#138 no longer reported)

2026-07-11.versionDrift: typescript 6.0.3 -> 7.0.2 (1 major, below 2+ threshold, info-only); knip 6.25.0 -> 6.26.0 (patch). No tickets.
